buffs.name: Debilitating Injury: Bewildered (−2 AC on target)

feats.name: Sneak Attack +2d6
feats.shortDesc: +2d6 damage when target is denied DEX to AC or when flanking. Ranged only within 30 ft.
feats.fullDesc: If Mariano can catch an opponent when he is unable to defend himself effectively, he can strike vital spots for extra damage. Any time the target is denied a Dexterity bonus to AC, or when Mariano flanks the target, the attack deals +2d6 extra damage. This extra damage is not multiplied on a critical hit. Ranged sneak attacks only count if the target is within 30 feet.

feats.name: Finesse Training (Dagger)
feats.shortDesc: Free Weapon Finesse. Add DEX modifier instead of STR to damage rolls with daggers.
feats.fullDesc: Mariano uses DEX (+5) instead of STR (−2) for attack rolls with light weapons (Weapon Finesse). At 3rd level, he selected the dagger: he now also adds DEX (+5) to damage rolls instead of STR (−2) with daggers. This is why the Gold Plated Dagger deals 1d3+5 damage and hits at +10 (BAB 3 + DEX 5 + size 1 + Weapon Focus 1).

feats.name: Uncanny Dodge
feats.shortDesc: Cannot be caught flat-footed; retains DEX bonus to AC even when flat-footed or against invisible attackers.
feats.fullDesc: Mariano can react to danger before his senses would normally allow him to do so. He cannot be caught flat-footed, nor does he lose his Dexterity bonus to AC if the attacker is invisible. This is why his flat-footed AC equals his full AC (20). He still loses DEX if immobilized or if feinted against.

feats.name: Evasion
feats.shortDesc: On a successful Reflex save against a half-damage effect, take no damage instead.
feats.fullDesc: If Mariano makes a successful Reflex saving throw against an attack that normally deals half damage on a successful save, he instead takes no damage. Evasion can only be used if wearing light armor or no armor.

feats.name: Danger Sense +1
feats.shortDesc: +1 Reflex saves vs traps, +1 dodge AC vs trap attacks, +1 Perception vs surprise.
feats.fullDesc: Mariano gains a +1 bonus on Reflex saves to avoid traps and a +1 dodge bonus to AC against attacks by traps. In addition, he gains a +1 bonus on Perception checks to avoid being surprised by a foe. These bonuses are already reflected in his stat block conditionals.

feats.name: Debilitating Injury
feats.shortDesc: After dealing sneak attack damage, impose one of: −2 AC (Bewildered), −2 attack (Disoriented), or half speed (Hampered) for 1 round.
feats.fullDesc: At 4th level, whenever Mariano deals sneak attack damage, he can also debilitate the target for 1 round. Choose one: Bewildered (−2 AC, −2 additional AC vs Mariano's attacks), Disoriented (−2 on attack rolls, −2 additional on attacks vs Mariano), or Hampered (all speeds halved, can't take a 5-foot step). Penalties don't stack with themselves; each new sneak attack can extend the duration.

feats.name: Trapfinding
feats.shortDesc: +2 Perception to find traps, +2 Disable Device. Can disarm magical traps.
feats.fullDesc: Mariano adds +2 on Perception checks made to locate traps and to Disable Device checks. He can use the Disable Device skill to disarm magic traps. This bonus is already included in his skill totals (Disable Device 14, Perception 11).

feats.name: Minor Magic: Acid Splash
feats.shortDesc: Cast Acid Splash at will as a spell-like ability (CL 4, DC 14).
feats.fullDesc: Rogue talent. Mariano can cast Acid Splash at will as a spell-like ability. Caster level 4, save DC 14 (INT-based). Acid Splash: ranged touch attack, deals 1d3 acid damage. Bookish Rogue feat allows him to swap this spell by studying a spellbook for 10 minutes.

feats.name: Underhanded
feats.shortDesc: +4 Sleight of Hand to conceal weapons. During surprise round with concealed weapon: sneak attack deals maximum damage automatically.
feats.fullDesc: Rogue talent. Mariano gains +4 circumstance bonus on all Sleight of Hand checks made to conceal a weapon. If he makes a sneak attack during the surprise round using a concealed weapon the opponent did not know about, he does not need to roll sneak attack damage — it deals maximum damage automatically. Usable CHA modifier times per day (3/day).

feats.name: Weapon Finesse
feats.shortDesc: Use DEX instead of STR for attack rolls with light weapons, rapiers, and whips.
feats.fullDesc: With a light weapon, rapier, whip, or spiked chain made for his size, Mariano may use his Dexterity modifier (+5) instead of his Strength modifier (−2) on attack rolls. Gained as a bonus feat at 1st level via Finesse Training.

feats.name: Weapon Focus (Dagger)
feats.shortDesc: +1 bonus on all attack rolls made with daggers.
feats.fullDesc: Mariano is especially skilled with daggers. He gains a +1 bonus on all attack rolls made using the dagger. This +1 is included in the Gold Plated Dagger's attack bonus (+10 = BAB 3 + DEX 5 + size 1 + WF 1).

feats.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
feats.shortDesc: Fight with a weapon in each hand. Primary hand penalty −2, off-hand penalty −2 (with light off-hand weapon).
feats.fullDesc: Mariano can fight with a weapon in each of his hands (two Gold Plated Daggers), making one extra attack each round with the secondary weapon. The standard penalty is reduced: primary hand −2 (normally −4), off-hand −2 (normally −8 with a light off-hand weapon). Both daggers use DEX for attack via Weapon Finesse.

feats.name: Skill Focus (Stealth)
feats.shortDesc: +3 bonus on Stealth checks. Increases to +6 with 10+ ranks.
feats.fullDesc: Mariano is particularly adept at Stealth. He gets a +3 bonus on all Stealth checks. This +3 is included in his Stealth total (24 = DEX 5 + ranks 4 + class skill 3 + size 4 + Skill Focus 3 + Cloak 5). This bonus increases to +6 at 10+ ranks.

feats.name: Extra Unchained Rogue Talent
feats.shortDesc: Gain one additional unchained rogue talent.
feats.fullDesc: Through constant practice, Mariano has learned an additional special trick. He gained the Underhanded rogue talent through this feat. Can be taken multiple times, each time granting one additional rogue talent.

feats.name: Bookish Rogue
feats.shortDesc: Spend 10 minutes with a spellbook to permanently swap Minor Magic spell to any same-level sorcerer/wizard spell in it.
feats.fullDesc: By studying a spellbook for 10 minutes, Mariano can change the spell he is able to cast using his Minor Magic talent to any sorcerer/wizard spell of the same level contained in the spellbook. This change is permanent until he takes the time to change it again.

feats.name: Halfling Racial Traits
feats.shortDesc: Fearless (+2 vs fear), Halfling Luck (+1 all saves), Keen Senses (+2 Perception), Sure-Footed (+2 Acrobatics/Climb), size bonus (+1 AC/attack), speed 20 ft.
feats.fullDesc: Mariano benefits from several halfling racial traits: Fearless (+2 racial bonus on saves vs. fear, stacks with Halfling Luck); Halfling Luck (+1 racial bonus on all saving throws, included in saves); Keen Senses (+2 bonus on Perception, included); Sure-Footed (+2 racial bonus on Acrobatics and Climb, included); Small size (+1 size bonus to AC and attack rolls, included); base speed 20 ft.

classAbilities.name: Uncanny Dodge
classAbilities.description: Cannot be caught flat-footed. Retains DEX bonus to AC when flat-footed or attacked by invisible opponents. Flat-footed AC = full AC (20).

classAbilities.name: Debilitating Injury
classAbilities.description: After dealing sneak attack damage, choose one penalty on the target for 1 round: Bewildered (−2 AC, stacks to −4 vs Mariano), Disoriented (−2 attack, stacks to −4 vs Mariano), or Hampered (half speed, no 5-foot step). Extra sneak attacks extend duration.

classAbilities.name: Minor Magic: Acid Splash
classAbilities.description: Rogue talent — cast Acid Splash at will as a spell-like ability. CL 4, DC 14 (INT-based). Ranged touch attack dealing 1d3 acid damage. Can swap spell via Bookish Rogue feat (10 min with a spellbook).

classAbilities.name: Underhanded (3/day)
classAbilities.description: Rogue talent — +4 circumstance bonus on Sleight of Hand to conceal a weapon. During the surprise round with a concealed weapon the opponent didn't know about: sneak attack automatically deals maximum damage (no roll needed). Usable CHA mod times per day (3/day).

classAbilities.name: Finesse Training (Dagger)
classAbilities.description: Uses DEX (+5) instead of STR (−2) for attack rolls with all light weapons (Weapon Finesse). Also uses DEX (+5) instead of STR (−2) for damage rolls specifically with daggers. Explains Gold Plated Dagger: +10 to hit (BAB 3 + DEX 5 + size 1 + Weapon Focus 1), 1d3+5 damage.

classAbilities.name: Halfling Racial Traits
classAbilities.description: Languages: Common, Dwarven, Elven, Gnome, Goblin, Halfling. +1 size bonus to AC and attack rolls. +1 to all saving throws (Halfling Luck). +2 racial bonus on saves vs. fear (Fearless). +2 Perception (Keen Senses). +2 Acrobatics and Climb (Sure-Footed). +4 size bonus to Stealth. Speed 20 ft.

spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.description: You fire a small orb of acid as a ranged touch attack. The orb deals 1d3 acid damage on a hit. As a cantrip it can be cast unlimited times per day.

inventory.name: +1 Studded Leather Armor
inventory.description: +4 AC (armor +3, enhancement +1), light armor. Max DEX +5, no armor check penalty.

inventory.name: Golden Dagger
inventory.description: A finely crafted dagger with a gilded blade. Primary hand for two-weapon fighting.

inventory.name: Golden Dagger
inventory.description: Twin to the first — matching gilded blade, balanced for the off hand.

inventory.name: Belt of Tumbling
inventory.description: +4 competence bonus on Acrobatics checks to move through a threatened square or enemy's space.

inventory.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
inventory.description: +5 competence bonus to Stealth checks. Faint illusion aura, CL 3rd.

inventory.name: Boots of Elvenkind
inventory.description: +5 competence bonus to Stealth checks. Silent as shadow. Faint transmutation, CL 5th.

inventory.name: Dagger (Small)
inventory.description: Standard daggers for throwing. 1d3 damage, crit 19-20/×2, range increment 10 ft.

inventory.name: Poison: Black Adder Venom
inventory.description: Injury; Fort DC 11; Freq 1 rnd (6); Effect 1d2 Con dmg; Cure 1 save.

inventory.name: Poison: Oil of Taggit
inventory.description: Ingested; Fort DC 15; Onset 1 min; Effect unconsciousness 1d3 hours; Cure 1 save.

inventory.name: Rope (50 ft.)
inventory.description: Standard hemp rope for climbing and binding.

inventory.name: Grappling Hook
inventory.description: For scaling walls and making escapes.

inventory.name: Torch
inventory.description: Bright 20 ft., shadowy 40 ft. Burns 1 hour.

inventory.name: Caltrops
inventory.description: Scatter to slow pursuers. Creatures moving through take 1 damage and must make DC 15 Reflex or speed halved for 24 hours.
